hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s.*main' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just pushed to main. You MUST now update changes.md: append a new dated entry with a high-level description of the changes that were pushed and the key files affected. Then commit and push changes.md to main."}}' || echo '{}'
